data.name: FailedToCreateRetryDirectoryBecauseOfCollision
data.value: Failed to create retries directory due to collisions in '{0}' despite re-trying.
data.comment: '{0}' is the directory where collisions happen

data.name: FailureThresholdPolicy
data.value: Failure threshold policy is enabled, failed tests will not be restarted.

data.name: FailureThresholdPolicyMaxCount
data.value: Maximum failed tests threshold is {0} and {1} tests failed
data.comment: {0} is the maximum failed tests threshold. {1} is the failed tests count.

data.name: FailureThresholdPolicyMaxPercentage
data.value: Percentage failed threshold is {0}% and {1}% tests failed ({2}/{3})
data.comment: {0} is the maximum failed tests percentage threshold. {1} is the actual failed tests percentage. {2} is the failed tests count. {3} is the total tests count.

data.name: RetryArtifactsMoved
data.value: Retry: moved {0} result file(s) to '{1}'
data.comment: {0} is the number of files moved. {1} is the destination result directory.

data.name: RetryAttemptFailedWillRetry
data.value: Retry: attempt {0}/{1} failed - {2} failing test(s), retrying
data.comment: {0} is the current attempt number. {1} is the total number of attempts. {2} is the number of failing tests in this attempt.

data.name: RetryWaitingBeforeNextAttempt
data.value: Retry: waiting {0} before attempt {1}/{2}
data.comment: {0} is the delay (e.g. '1s'). {1} is the next attempt number. {2} is the total number of attempts.

data.name: RetrySummaryPassed
data.value: Retry summary: Passed! after {0}/{1} attempts
data.comment: {0} is the number of attempts used. {1} is the maximum number of attempts. Keep 'Retry summary:' and 'Passed!' parallel to the platform 'Test run summary: Passed!' wording.

data.name: RetrySummaryPassedNoRetry
data.value: Retry summary: Passed! on the first attempt (no retries needed)
data.comment: Keep 'Retry summary:' and 'Passed!' parallel to the platform 'Test run summary: Passed!' wording.

data.name: RetrySummaryFailed
data.value: Retry summary: Failed! after {0}/{1} attempts
data.comment: {0} is the number of attempts used. {1} is the maximum number of attempts. Keep 'Retry summary:' and 'Failed!' parallel to the platform 'Test run summary: Failed!' wording.

data.name: RetrySummaryFailedLine
data.value: failed: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the number of tests still failing after the final attempt. Two leading spaces and the lowercase 'failed:' label mirror the platform run summary.

data.name: RetrySummaryFlakyLine
data.value: flaky: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the number of tests that failed at least once but eventually passed. Two leading spaces and the lowercase 'flaky:' label mirror the platform run summary.

data.name: RetrySummaryTotalLine
data.value: total: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the total number of tests in the suite. Two leading spaces and the lowercase 'total:' label mirror the platform run summary.

data.name: RetrySummaryRetriedSuffix
data.value: (+{0} retried)
data.comment: {0} is the number of test executions that were retried. Appended to the total line, mirroring the platform '(+N retried)' suffix.

data.name: RetrySummaryDurationLine
data.value: duration: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the total retry orchestration duration. Two leading spaces and the lowercase 'duration:' label mirror the platform run summary.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsCannotStartProcessErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to start process '{0}'
data.comment: {0} is the process file path.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsExtensionDescription
data.value: Retry failed tests feature allows to restart test execution upon failure.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsExtensionDisplayName
data.value: Retry failed tests

data.name: RetryExtensionNotSupportedOnBrowserErrorMessage
data.value: The retry extension is not supported on browser platform. Browser-based tests cannot be retried due to platform limitations.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsMaxPercentageOptionDescription
data.value: Disable retry mechanism if the percentage of failed tests is greater than the specified value
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests-max-percentage"}.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsMaxTestsOptionDescription
data.value: Disable retry mechanism if the number of failed tests is greater than the specified value
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests-max-tests"}.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsNotSupportedInHotReloadErrorMessage
data.value: Retry failed tests feature is not supported in hot reload mode

data.name: RetryFailedTestsNotSupportedInServerModeErrorMessage
data.value: Retry failed tests feature is not supported in server mode

data.name: RetryFailedTestsDelayOptionDescription
data.value: Add a delay between retries. The delay is expressed as a time value, e.g. 200, 500ms, 1s, 2.5m, 1h, 1d. Default unit is milliseconds.
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests-delay"} or time examples {Locked="200"}{Locked="500ms"}{Locked="1s"}{Locked="2.5m"}{Locked="1h"}{Locked="1d"}.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsDelayOptionInvalidArgument
data.value: Option '--retry-failed-tests-delay' requires a valid time span value that is non-negative and no greater than 2147483647ms (~24.20:31:23.647) (e.g. 200, 500ms, 1s, 2.5m, 1h, 1d)
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests-delay"} or time examples {Locked="2147483647ms"}{Locked="200"}{Locked="500ms"}{Locked="1s"}{Locked="2.5m"}{Locked="1h"}{Locked="1d"}.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsOptionDescription
data.value: Retry failed tests the given number of times
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests"}.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsOptionIsMissingErrorMessage
data.value: Option '{0}' requires option '{1}' to be specified
data.comment: {0} is the option name that was specified. {1} is the required option name.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsOptionNonNegativeIntegerArgumentErrorMessage
data.value: Option '{0}' expects a non-negative integer argument
data.comment: {0} is the option name.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsMaxPercentageOptionIntegerBetween0And100ArgumentErrorMessage
data.value: Option '{0}' expects an integer argument between 0 and 100
data.comment: {0} is the option name.

data.name: RetryFailedTestsPercentageAndCountCannotBeMixedErrorMessage
data.value: Options '{0}' and '{1}' cannot be used together
data.comment: {0} is the first option name. {1} is the second option name.

data.name: TestHostProcessExitedBeforeRetryCouldConnect
data.value: Test host process exited before the retry service could connect to it. Exit code: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the test host process exit code.

data.name: TestSuiteFailedWithWrongExitCode
data.value: Test suite failed with and exit code different that 2 (failed tests). Failure related to an unexpected condition. Exit code '{0}'
data.comment: {0} is the exit code.
